nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I still worry about any mistakes that could happen if I delegate AI to handle it on its own

nodes.label: Personal skill maintenance

nodes.grounding_span: I do try to maintain my skills in those areas

nodes.grounding_span: change the tone of it to sound more like myself

nodes.label: Professional competence and control
nodes.grounding_span: I know what the client is asking for and the responses better than the AI

nodes.label: Continuous learning and adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: I see myself trying to expand my uses beyond what I am currently using it for

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI for routine tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I still worry about any mistakes that could happen if I delegate AI to handle it on its own

nodes.label: Optimistic openness to expanding AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I see myself trying to expand my uses beyond what I am currently using it for

nodes.label: Iterative refinement — uses AI output as draft, then edits
nodes.grounding_span: I use the draft as a starting point, but I always revise it first

nodes.label: Contextual prioritization — weighs speed vs. review effort
